summary: Iteration 29 - Orange Money, Orange SMS, and USSD Gateway Integration Testing. ALL 24 TESTS PASSED. Verified: All 3 services in MOCK mode with placeholder credentials, admin-only integrations-status endpoint, public simulation-status, USSD calculate-premium and callback endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: OrangeMoneyService correctly detects absent credentials (ORANGE_MONEY_CLIENT_ID, ORANGE_MONEY_CLIENT_SECRET, ORANGE_MERCHANT_KEY) and sets is_configured=false, mode=mock
OrangeSMSService correctly detects absent credentials (ORANGE_SMS_CLIENT_ID, ORANGE_SMS_CLIENT_SECRET) and sets is_configured=false, mode=mock
USSDGatewayService correctly detects absent credentials (USSD_GATEWAY_URL, USSD_GATEWAY_API_KEY) and sets is_configured=false, mode=mock
GET /api/payments/integrations-status correctly restricts access to admin users only (returns 403 for non-admin)
GET /api/payments/simulation-status is public and correctly returns simulation_mode=true
All services have get_status() method returning consistent schema: {service, configured, mode, ...}
Backend server starts without errors with placeholder credentials in .env
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 tested Orange Money, Orange SMS, and USSD Gateway integration services. All 3 are in MOCK mode because .env has empty placeholder values. Tests in /app/backend/tests/test_orange_integrations.py cover: simulation-status endpoint (public, returns simulation_mode=true), integrations-status endpoint (admin-only, returns all 3 service statuses), USSD calculate-premium (public carbon calculator), USSD callback (main menu). The login API uses 'identifier' field not 'email' and returns 'access_token' not 'token'.

features_verified.GET /api/payments/simulation-status: PASS - Returns {simulation_mode: true, message: 'Mode simulation activé...'}
features_verified.all_configured field: PASS - Returns false when any service not configured
features_verified.POST /api/ussd/calculate-premium: PASS - Returns score, prime_fcfa_kg, prime_annuelle, eligible
features_verified.POST /api/ussd/callback: PASS - Returns session_id, text (with CON/END prefix), continue_session

mocked_api_note: ALL 3 ORANGE INTEGRATIONS ARE MOCKED BY DESIGN (Orange Money API, Orange SMS API, USSD Gateway API) - placeholder credentials in .env. Real API calls will only happen when valid credentials are filled in.
